title: How the first hour of your day changes everything
caption:
The first hour runs the rest.

Not because of some morning-routine hack. Because whoever gets your first conscious thought gets your day.

Most men hand it to a screen before they've said one word to God. Then they wonder why their faith feels distant and their focus is scattered by 9 a.m.

Put the phone in another room. Open the Word first. Move your body. Build the routine before you feel like it — because you won't always feel like it, and the men who are built don't wait for the feeling.

Discipline at 6 a.m. outlasts motivation by noon.

—

Save this for the brother who keeps saying he's going to fix his mornings.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #earlymorning #scripture #morningroutine #manofgod
